## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] Browser dogfood performed if user-facing behavior changed

## Security / artifacts

- [ ] No tokens, cookies, browser state files, private screenshots, or local artifacts committed
- [ ] User-facing docs/skills updated if tools, commands, or workflows changed
